name: Pear Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pears into medium-sized pieces and mix with sugar.
2. Let stand until some juice forms.
3. Boil down until it starts to thicken slightly.
4. Squeeze the juice from oranges and lemons.
5. Slice the orange and lemon skins thinly or grind them.
6. Steam the skins until tender and add them along with the juice to the pears.
7. Continue boiling until the desired thickness is reached (marmalade may stick more during this second boiling, so boil away enough pears before adding oranges and lemons).
8. Add chopped walnuts and maraschino cherries just before sealing if desired.
